stemHtml: The density altitude is 3000 ft at an airport whose PA is 1000 ft. What is the effect on the aircraft?

options.a: Take-off and landing performance will be about the same as for an airport elevation of 3000 ft.
options.b: The altimeter will indicate 3000 ft when the aircraft is on the ground.
options.c: The indicated speed at 50 kts on take-off and landing will be higher than in standard atmosphere.
options.d: Take-off and landing performance will be unaffected.
